tools.name: search_listings
tools.description: Search Swiss apartments and houses for rent or sale. Supports city filtering (Zürich, Bern, Basel, Geneva), price (CHF), rooms, and square meters. EXAMPLES: "apartments in Zurich under 2000", "3-room flat in Bern", "house to buy in Basel".

tools.name: get_listing_detail
tools.description: Get full details for a specific property by ID. Returns amenities, pricing breakdown, contact info, images.

tools.name: get_similar_listings
tools.description: Return listings similar to a given property (same area/category).

tools.name: get_popular_listings
tools.description: Fetch the most popular/trending Swiss property listings.

tools.name: get_reserved_ranges
tools.description: Check availability/booking dates for a specific property. Returns blocked date ranges.

tools.name: search_guides
tools.description: Search Immoswipe blog/guide articles about Swiss housing: renting tips, expat relocation guides, buying advice, deposits, tenancy law. Use for "how to" / advice questions. Returns titles, slugs and links; use get_guide to read the full article.

tools.name: get_guide
tools.description: Read the full Markdown text of a specific Immoswipe guide/blog article by slug (get the slug from search_guides).

tools.name: get_faqs
tools.description: Get Immoswipe FAQs about using the platform, renting, listing a property, photography/tour services and pricing.

tools.name: check_rental_chances
tools.description: Wohnungs-Chancen-Check for Swiss tenants: rates chances on the rental market (tenant score 0–100) from a search profile using real BFS vacancy, rent and ZKB market data, and suggests better alternative regions. tools.name: join_tenant_pool
tools.description: Register a Swiss tenant in the Immoswipe Mieter-Pool so property managers see their search profile and contact them about matching units. WRITE operation with personal data: ONLY call after the user has EXPLICITLY agreed to join the pool. consent must be true. Typical flow: run check_rental_chances
